label: Makerspace Access Checkpoint
customer_problem: A member says their laser cutter booking vanished before open lab tonight and asks if staff can unlock the bench anyway.
customer_facts: The booking is missing before open lab tonight.
The member wants immediate bench access.
The access request depends on certification and booking policy.
risk_flags: Do not promise automatic access restoration.
Do not bypass active tool certification.
Do not approve an after-hours exception in the reply.
success_criteria: Mirror the missing booking in the first sentence.
Name the certification or 24-hour booking gate before the next step.
Give one checkpoint that asks for the badge or tool detail.
operator_notes: Best demo for showing habit selection on booking and access language.
The reply should combine confidence with a clear policy boundary.
